---
title: "Lectures"
---

### Lectures

[Lecture 01 — Bulk vs. Single-Cell RNA-seq: Overview of the Pipeline](Lecture_Folder/Lecture_01_Bulk_vs_scRNAseq.html)

### Extra Topics

[Pseudobulk Differential Expression](Lecture_Folder/Lecture_Extra_Pseudobulk.html)

### Appendix Lectures (Pre-requisite Computational Tools)

[Appendix A - Computer Systems & Computing Fundamentals](Lecture_Folder/Appendix_A.html)

[Appendix B - Unix & the Command Line](Lecture_Folder/Appendix_B.html)

[Appendix C - GREP, Regular Expressions & Shell Scripting](Lecture_Folder/Appendix_C.html)

[Appendix D - R Programming Fundamentals](Lecture_Folder/Appendix_D.html)

[Appendix E - Git, GitHub & Version Control](Lecture_Folder/Appendix_E.html)

[Appendix F - High-Performance Computing with Talapas](Lecture_Folder/Appendix_F.html)

### Quarto Template for New Lectures

[Lecture Template (source)](Lecture_Folder/Lecture_Template.qmd)

### Datasets for In-Class Exercises

*Link to the datasets used in each lecture as they are added.*
